channel.title: Very Important People
channel.description: Latest releases from Very Important People on Dropout.tv

item.title: Last Looks: Oops Lil Fart
item.description:
The crew of Very Important People discuss how Lisa Gilroy became Oops Lil Fart.

Duration: 05:46

Tags: Very Important People, vic michaelis, disguises, makeup, makeovers, interviews, improv, surprises, lisa gilroy, tamar levine, alex perrone, alisha silverstein, paul robalino, behind the scenes

item.title: Oops Lil Fart
item.description:
Vic interviews their imaginary friend Oops Lil Fart (Lisa Gilroy) and remembers their childhood.

Duration: 23:19

Tags: Very Important People, vic michaelis, disguises, makeup, makeovers, interviews, improv, surprises, lisa gilroy

item.title: Last Looks: Zinnia
item.description:
The crew of Very Important People discuss how Demi Adejuyigbe became Zinnia.

Duration: 03:42

Tags: Very Important People, vic michaelis, disguises, makeup, makeovers, interviews, improv, surprises, demi adejuyigbe, tamar levine, alex perrone, bruce spaulding fuller, alisha silverstein, behind the scenes

item.title: Zinnia
item.description:
Vic and children’s entertainer Zinnia (Demi Adejuyigbe) teach kids all about the news.

Duration: 15:38

Tags: Very Important People, vic michaelis, disguises, makeup, makeovers, interviews, improv, surprises, demi adejuyigbe

item.description:

item.title: Sudzo
item.description:
Vic interviews Sudzo (Eugene Cordero) and learns all about superhero society.

Duration: 19:28

Tags: Very Important People, vic michaelis, disguises, makeup, makeovers, interviews, improv, surprises, eugene cordero
